title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Invariant Lens: Algorithm Portfolio
summary: Build and defend a planning engine across graph, optimization, and uncertain-load requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 algorithm portfolio increment in an advanced algorithm system with proof and operations packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare exact, approximate, randomized, and baseline candidates under one evidence model.
Explain computational limits with options and evidence rather than jargon or certainty.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
